name: Carte nationale d’identité
prompt:
Extract the following fields from this national identity card image.
Read both sides if visible.

Return ONLY a JSON object with these exact keys (use null for any field you cannot read):
{
  "idNumber": "The national identity card number",
  "issuingCountry": "3-letter ICAO country code of the issuing country (e.g. FRA, MAR, DZA, TUN)",
  "issueDate": "Date of issue in YYYY-MM-DD format",
  "expiryDate": "Date of expiry in YYYY-MM-DD format"
}

Return ONLY the JSON, no markdown, no explanation.
